title: cacalia ehrenbergiana
intro: Cacalia ehrenbergiana, also known as Asian wild lettuce or Ehrenberg's cacalia, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cacalia ehrenbergiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, as well as being dried and used as a powder for various applications.
